title: Law, Contracts & Rights
topics: contracts · consumer rights · legal language · formal correspondence
description: Právo, smlouvy a práva spotřebitele — praktická právní angličtina.
notes: ✓ 'In accordance with' = v souladu s: 'In accordance with the contract'
✓ 'Notwithstanding' = i přesto, bez ohledu na (formal legal)
⚠️  'Liable FOR' something; 'entitled TO' something; 'bound BY' a contract

examples.en: The contract is binding on both parties from the date of signing.
examples.cz: Smlouva je závazná pro obě strany ode dne podpisu.

examples.en: You are entitled to a full refund within 14 days of purchase.
examples.cz: Máte nárok na plné vrácení peněz do 14 dnů od nákupu.

examples.en: The company was sued for breach of contract.
examples.cz: Společnost byla žalována za porušení smlouvy.

examples.en: Any dispute shall be settled by arbitration.
examples.cz: Jakýkoli spor bude řešen rozhodčím řízením.

quiz.sentence: You are ___ to a refund if the goods are faulty. (have a right)
The company was found ___ for the data breach.
The clause was ___ and had no legal effect.
She ___ the company for damages of €50,000.

tasks: 1. Read the terms and conditions of a service you use — identify 5 key clauses
2. Write a formal complaint letter claiming a refund under consumer rights
3. Explain in simple English what 'intellectual property' means and give 3 examples
